oneLineSummary: Evidence-driven case advocacy briefing console. 6-tab iPad interface live. Gmail/Drive sync built. Ollama/OpenRouter chat ready. Blocked on: Google OAuth credentials + local server running.

liveDeployment.status: Live. Hard refresh to see latest.

completedThisSession: v2.05.0 → v2.06.0: Full 6-tab briefing console (Summary, Calendar, Timeline, Evidence, Live Notes, Responses, Tasks)
Document templating engine: Medical Chronology, Accommodation Statement, ODSP Summary — auto-compile from schema data
Calendar tab: Upcoming meetings with urgency coloring (today/this week/later)
Meeting pre-briefing: Click any meeting → full prep modal (briefing points, talking points, documents, print button)
Gmail/Drive auto-sync function (netlify/functions/gmail-drive-sync.js) — extracts meetings, contacts, medical docs
Sync button in header — one click triggers OAuth flow
Real case data structure: /data/cases.json with Matthew Herbert ODSP Review case
Confidence badge system enforced: Confirmed/Draft/Inferred/Missing/Needs Review
Schema validation layer: validateEvidenceCard(), CONFIDENCE enum
Removed fake contacts (Dr. Sarah Chen never existed)
gh-pages forced updated — live site now current

gmail_drive_sync.what_is_missing: Google Cloud project with Gmail API + Drive API enabled, Client ID + Secret in Netlify env vars
gmail_drive_sync.fix: See GMAIL_DRIVE_SETUP.md — 3 steps, ~15 minutes to configure
gmail_drive_sync.impact: Without this, all case data is sample data. With this, everything auto-populates from real Gmail/Drive

local_server.reason: User installing PowerShell, hasn't run node command yet
local_server.what_is_missing: User needs to: cd to libby_live folder, run: node libby-local-server.js
local_server.impact: Ollama chat only works when local server is running. GitHub Pages uses Netlify → OpenRouter fallback

ollama.reason: Netlify functions try localhost:11434 — that's Netlify's server, not user's laptop
ollama.fix: Local server solves this. Or set OLLAMA_URL to publicly tunneled address (ngrok etc)
ollama.impact: Chat falls through to OpenRouter. Need OPENROUTER_API_KEY in Netlify env to make cloud chat work

real_patient_data.reason: No external agent (Gemini/ChatGPT) has populated the evidence ledger yet
real_patient_data.what_exists: data/cases.json has Matthew Herbert ODSP structure, all sample values
real_patient_data.what_is_needed: Real diagnoses, real contacts, real meetings, real documents from Drive

step1.title: Run local server
step1.result: Ollama chat works, real-time transcript ingestion works

step2.title: Set up Google OAuth (15 min)
step2.result: Gmail/Drive sync button works, real meetings/contacts auto-populate

step3.title: Click Sync in Libby Live
step3.result: Real ODSP meetings, real contacts, real documents populate briefing console

step4.title: Feed patient updates from other apps
step4.or: Update /data/cases.json directly until sync is live
step4.result: Briefing console reflects real case status

patientOnboardingInstructions.manual_method: Edit /data/cases.json — structure is at data/cases.json, follows 12-entity schema

nextAgentInstructions.priority_1: Verify local server starts (node libby-local-server.js) and chat works via Ollama
nextAgentInstructions.priority_2: Complete Google OAuth setup (see GMAIL_DRIVE_SETUP.md) so sync button works
nextAgentInstructions.priority_3: Once sync works — verify real meetings populate Calendar tab
nextAgentInstructions.priority_4: If patient data is coming from external apps — wire POST endpoint to ingest-transcript.js
nextAgentInstructions.priority_5: Meeting mode pre-briefing auto-generates talking points — test with real meeting
do_not: Do not add more fake sample contacts or fake doctor names
Do not rebuild UI from scratch — it is complete
Do not change architecture — schema-first is settled
Do not add external dependencies or build steps

architecture_settled.frontend: index.html — single file, no framework, no build step
architecture_settled.backend: netlify/functions/ — serverless, no server needed for cloud
architecture_settled.local: libby-local-server.js — runs on user's laptop for Ollama
architecture_settled.data: data/cases.json — source of truth until Gmail/Drive sync active

tokenUsage.nextSession: Fresh context — read this file + COORDINATOR_STATUS.md + GMAIL_DRIVE_SETUP.md first
tokenUsage.recommendation: Next session should focus on OAuth setup + real data flow, not UI changes
